keyboard_equivalent.notes: Publish routes remain addressable by command id and reachable from the palette even when no default shortcut exists.

default_branch.label: Review publish
default_branch.notes: Default route opens the publish review surface before any external/shared commit.

alternate_branches.label: Publish to Staging
alternate_branches.notes: Alternate route targets a different publish destination; branch choice is auditably recorded.

alternate_branches.label: Export publish plan
alternate_branches.notes: Export does not commit external state; it exists to support review and handoff.

__fixture__.name: split_button_routes
__fixture__.scenario: A split button declares a default review-first route, exposes alternate publish routes via disclosure, and records which branch was chosen when side effects differ materially.
contract_sections: Split buttons: default route, alternates, and auditability
